description: Ana Isabel Betz, a patient with Type 1 diabetes mellitus, has been referred to nephrology after routine labs revealed eGFR 42 mL/min and significant albuminuria consistent with CKD Stage 3b. As the consulting nephrologist, complete the CKD evaluation and management plan in GNU Health: formally stage the chronic kidney disease, order a comprehensive renal monitoring panel, initiate renoprotective pharmacotherapy, document dietary counseling for renal diet compliance, and schedule a 3-month nephrology follow-up. Login: admin / gnusolidario.
